repo.name: zen-ui
repo.readme_summary: @algorisys/zen-ui-react A React component library shipping **shadcn-style primitives on top of Radix UI**, themed via CSS custom properties. Every component forwards a ref, supports `asChild` where it makes sense, and exposes a flat React-idiomatic prop API.

files.doc: Type declaration for CSS styles side-effect import
Type declaration for the CSS side-effect import.
